title: cyclosorus confertus
intro: Cyclosorus confertus, also known as the fern-like plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Thelypteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus confertus include its ability to reduce fever, treat digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. The plant is often prepared as a tea or dried extract, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, showcasing its potential as a natural herbal remedy.
